payload.answer: Remembering the source context only: the article at https://example.com/missing could not be fetched because of a 404 network error.
payload.decision: Do not store the article content as durable memory; only retain the fetch failure/context as a limited note because the source was unavailable (404).

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced URL can be noted as an unresolved/failed source, but there is no retrievable article entity or durable content to resolve into memory.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to store the referenced article as durable memory despite a failed fetch.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt was made to remember an article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture context, but the fetch returned a 404 network error, so the article content could not be retrieved.

details: No article content stored as durable memory.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL later if the source may have changed.
Provide an alternate archive or cached copy.
If the goal is memory architecture knowledge, supply a summary or excerpt to store instead.
